content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be retooled to store and retrieve "curiosity traces" — episodic records of which previously unexplored environments or prediction errors triggered intrinsic reward in ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning agents. This allows agents to avoid re-expending exploration on regions they have already deemed uninformative, and instead prioritize entirely novel frontiers they have never accessed before.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
